sqlMap.sql:
where u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
u.displayname like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
u.description like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
u.displayname2 like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
u.description2 like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cabinet_company_capacity where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, company_id from tbl_cabinet_company_capacity where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cabinet_company_capacity (company_id, capacity_type, capacity_value, tenant_id) values (#companyId#, #type#, #capacity#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cabinet_company_capacity set capacity_type = #type#, capacity_value = #capacity# where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select:
select u.cn as cn, case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as display_name, u.department as department_id, case when #primary# = '1' THEN u.description else u.description2 end as department_name, u.physicaldeliveryofficename as company_id, case when #primary# = '1' then u.company else u.company2 end as company_name, if(w.capacity_value is not null, w.capacity_value, ifnull(c.capacity_value, 0)) as total_capacity, if(w.capacity_type is not null, w.capacity_type, ifnull(c.capacity_type, 1)) as capacity_tp, case when #primary# = '1' then u.title else u.title2 end as job_title, ( select ifnull (sum(cast(f.file_size as int)), 0) from tbl_cabinet_attach_file f join tbl_cabinet_item i on f.item_id = i.item_id and f.tenant_id = i.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and i.create_id = u.cn ) as total_used, u.tenant_id as tenant_id from tbl_usermaster u left join tbl_cabinet_user_capacity w on u.cn = w.user_id and u.physicaldeliveryofficename = w.company_id and u.tenant_id = w.tenant_id left join tbl_cabinet_company_capacity c on u.physicaldeliveryofficename = c.company_id and u.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
order by
$realColmn$ $order$,
department_name asc, display_name asc limit #startPoint#, #listCnt#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_cabinet_user_capacity ( user_id, capacity_type, capacity_value, company_id, tenant_id )
( #userList[]#, #capatype#, #capacity#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
on duplicate key update capacity_type = #capatype#, capacity_value = #capacity#
